title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm out with Super Creek...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Look over there! It's filled with so many cute
plushies

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look in the direction Super Creek is pointing and
see a claw machine filled with stuffed
Umamusume toys.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, they're so cute. I just want to take care of
all of them!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: But I've never really tried these machines before...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A troubled look spreads across Super Creek's
face.
choice_data_list: Do you want me to win you one?
Do you want me to win you one?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Really? You'd do that for me? Well, if you're
offering, then I gratefully accept!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Good luck! Oh, but don't push yourself too hard,
okay? That's a big no-no!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail!
